observed:
**Adherence:** 4/4 gym sessions ✓ · 2 runs (8.5 km, both Z2 ✓) · **0 mobility ✗** (target 3-5/wk).

**Performance highlights:**
- **Sumo DL: 225 × 6 × 4 sets all @ RPE 7** → clearly too easy, big room to add load.
- Back Squat 215 × 8 @ RPE 7.9 — solid, in target zone.
- Bench Press RPE creeping 8 → 8.5 across sets, dropping reps last 2 sets.
- OHP 4th set missed all 3 occasions.

**Body weight:** −0.4 kg/wk over 2 weeks → on-target loss zone.

**Red flags:**
- **Accessories collapsing.** Lower B (Apr 25) only completed 2/6 exercises. Upper B (Apr 24) only 3/6.
- **Zero mobility** while loading heavy compounds + deficit = back-injury risk.
- **No nutrition tracking** — flying blind on the deficit lever.
planNext:
**Load progressions:**
- **Sumo DL: +10-15 lb** (240 × 6) — RPE 7 across all sets confirms easy.
- **Back Squat: +5 lb** (220 × 8).
- **Barbell Row: +5 lb** (top set 150 × 10).
- **Bench Press: hold 205 lb** (consolidate before adding — RPE was creeping).
- **OHP: complete all 4 sets at 115 first**, then +5.
- **Chin-ups: hold +15 lb**, push for 4 × 6+ reps.

**Process fixes:**
- **Mobility: 3 sessions minimum this week.** Hip Reset 2× + Lumbar 1×. Pin to Wed/Sat or 5-min post-gym.
- **Lower B:** start session with Hip Thrust BEFORE BSS so glute priority work gets done.
- **Upper B:** small fast accessories (Cable Lateral, Incline Curl) BEFORE Landmine Row.
- **Nutrition:** log protein + calories at least 4 of 7 days this week.
